_publications._publicationTitle: RABL6A Regulates Schwann Cell Senescence in an RB1-Dependent Manner.

_contextSnippet: RB1 phosphorylation at S807/811, sites of CDK4/6 phosphorylation, was reduced. This was shown by both Western blotting and immunofluorescent (IF) staining
details: Successfully detected reduced RB1 phosphorylation at S807/811 sites in both Western blotting and immunofluorescent staining applications
